title: Utils (resilience)
items: withStatus (now: sugar for meta companion stores)

title: Caching, fallback & composition sugar
items: Python parity: same primitives in graphrefly-py

title: Reactive output consistency (no Promise in public APIs)
items: Audit all remaining exports for Promise<T> return types — fix any found
Update checkpoint adapter interface types: synchronous
Callback parameter types accept sync, Promise, Node, AsyncIterable via fromAny pattern
firstValueFrom exported for end-users only — not used internally

title: Composite data patterns
items: verifiable(source, verifyFn, opts?) — value node + verification companion
distill(source, extractFn, opts) — budget-constrained reactive memory store

title: Inspector (graph-native debugging)
items: observe(name, { structured: true }) returns ObserveResult object
observe(name, { timeline: true }) — timestamped events with batch context
observe(name, { causal: true }) — which dep triggered recomputation
observe(name, { derived: true }) — per-evaluation dep snapshots
graph.describe({ filter }) — filtered describe via options bag
reachable(described, from, direction, opts?) — BFS utility
Graph.inspectorEnabled flag — zero overhead when disabled
RxJS name aliases: combineLatest, debounceTime, throttleTime, shareReplay, catchError
Variadic API for merge, combine, zip, race
tap observer shape: { data, error, complete }

title: Progressive disclosure for describe() and observe()
items: graph.describe({ detail: 'standard' }) — type, status, value, deps, meta, versioning
graph.describe({ detail: 'full' }) — standard + guard info, last mutation
observe(name, { detail: 'full' }) — standard + timeline + causal + derived
described.expand('full') — fetch missing fields on demand
observed.expand({ causal: true }) — upgrade running observation
